name: wuhan-donghu-thesis
description: Generate, format, and validate Wuhan Donghu College undergraduate thesis Word drafts.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and validate Wuhan Donghu College thesis .docx drafts
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin for Wuhan Donghu College undergraduate thesis Word drafts that need school-specific cover pages, declarations, abstracts, TOC, figures, tables, references, page numbers, and template comparison.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Wuhan Donghu College thesis draft from project materials.
Validate this thesis .docx against the Wuhan Donghu College format.
